name: New Zealand Energy Corp.
summary: New Zealand Energy Corp., through its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration and production of oil and natural gas in New Zealand. The company holds interests in three petroleum mining licenses, one petroleum mining permit, and one petroleum exploration permit. It has interests in TWN Petroleum Mining Licenses comprising Waihapa/Ngaere, and Tariki; Copper Moki petroleum mining permit; and Eltham Petroleum exploration permit. It also operates midstream assets. As of December 31, 2019, the company had proved and probable reserves of 707,700 barrels of oil. New Zealand Energy Corp. was founded in 2010 and is based in Wellington, New Zealand.
